title: olea europaea var. oleaster
intro: Olea europaea var. oleaster, also known as the wild olive tree, is a variety of the olive tree that is often found in the Mediterranean region and is known for its smaller fruits and more compact growth habit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of olea europaea var. oleaster include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cognitive function, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of olea europaea var. oleaster include olive leaf tea, capsules, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
